# Construction Lead Generator App - Project Setup

## Project Overview
Construction lead generating app with mobile and web support.

**MVP Features:**
- Photo upload for construction projects
- AI-powered material analysis using OpenAI Vision API
- Price scraping from Home Depot, Lowes, Ace Hardware
- Material quote generation

**Future Features:**
- Contractor matching and membership system
- Construction permitting help by location
- Stripe payment integration
- App Store and Google Play deployment

**Tech Stack:**
- Mobile: React Native (Expo) for iOS/Android
- Backend: Next.js with API routes
- Database: PostgreSQL
- AI: OpenAI Vision API, GPT-4
- Language: TypeScript

## Setup Checklist

- [x] Create copilot-instructions.md in .github directory
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
- [x] Scaffold the Project
- [x] Customize the Project
- [x] Install Required Extensions
- [x] Compile the Project
- [ ] Create and Run Task
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete

## Development Guidelines
- Use TypeScript for type safety
- Follow React Native and Next.js best practices
- Keep MVP simple, build incrementally
- Plan for scalability from the start
